name: restaurant back office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For restaurant back office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments and supplier penalties. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: restaurant back office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of purchase orders and invoices leads to errors and delays

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of purchase orders and invoices leads to errors and delays
